name: Create Customer
description: Creates a new customer object. If a customer with the same email already exists, it returns the existing customer.
details: Use this API to register customers before initiating transactions. The customer_id returned should be stored for future reference.

bodyParams.name: email_id
bodyParams.description: Customer's email address. Must be unique.

bodyParams.name: mobile_number
bodyParams.description: Customer's mobile number with country code.

responses.description: Bad request – missing or invalid parameters.
Unauthorized – invalid or missing API key.
Conflict – customer with same email already exists.
